args.code:
import json, pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame(var_call_36Q0MPTUKvP6m34Ljr8UVYDC)

def categorize(title, desc):
    t = (title or '').lower()
    d = (desc or '').lower()
    s = t + ' ' + d
    sci_kw = ['science','technology','tech','game','computer','software','internet','web','robot','ai','artificial','space','nasa','satellite','mobile','phone','smartphone','chip','semiconductor','battery','energy','electric','electricity','biotech','medical','medicine','health','virus','vaccine','genome','research','laboratory','physics','chemistry','telescope']
    sports_kw = ['game','season','team','league','match','tournament','coach','quarterback','touchdown','nba','nfl','mlb','nhl','soccer','football','baseball','basketball','tennis','golf','olympic','broncos','pro bowl','wide receiver']
    business_kw = ['profit','profits','shares','stock','market','revenue','earnings','company','companies','merger','acquisition','oil','mining','bank','economic','economy','inflation','price','prices','dollar','trade']
    world_kw = ['china','iraq','israel','palestin','ukraine','russia','president','minister','election','war','attack','police','terror','united nations','un']

    # scoring
    def score(kws):
        return sum(1 for kw in kws if kw in s)

    scores = {
        'Science/Technology': score(sci_kw),
        'Sports': score(sports_kw),
        'Business': score(business_kw),
        'World': score(world_kw)
    }
    # tie-breaker priority
    priority = ['Science/Technology','Sports','Business','World']
    best = max(priority, key=lambda c: (scores[c], -priority.index(c)))
    return best

df['category'] = df.apply(lambda r: categorize(r.get('title'), r.get('description')), axis=1)

total = int(pd.to_numeric(df['article_id']).nunique())
sci = int((df['category']=='Science/Technology').sum())
frac = sci/total if total else None

out = {
    'total_articles': total,
    'science_technology_articles': sci,
    'fraction': frac
}
print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps(out))

import json, pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame(var_call_36Q0MPTUKvP6m34Ljr8UVYDC)

def categorize(title, desc):
    t = (title or '').lower()
    d = (desc or '').lower()
    s = t + ' ' + d
    sci_kw = ['science','technology','tech','game','computer','software','internet','web','robot','ai','artificial','space','nasa','satellite','mobile','phone','smartphone','chip','semiconductor','battery','energy','electric','electricity','biotech','medical','medicine','health','virus','vaccine','genome','research','laboratory','physics','chemistry','telescope']
    sports_kw = ['game','season','team','league','match','tournament','coach','quarterback','touchdown','nba','nfl','mlb','nhl','soccer','football','baseball','basketball','tennis','golf','olympic','broncos','pro bowl','wide receiver']
    business_kw = ['profit','profits','shares','stock','market','revenue','earnings','company','companies','merger','acquisition','oil','mining','bank','economic','economy','inflation','price','prices','dollar','trade']
    world_kw = ['china','iraq','israel','palestin','ukraine','russia','president','minister','election','war','attack','police','terror','united nations','un']

    # scoring
    def score(kws):
        return sum(1 for kw in kws if kw in s)

    scores = {
        'Science/Technology': score(sci_kw),
        'Sports': score(sports_kw),
        'Business': score(business_kw),
        'World': score(world_kw)
    }
    # tie-breaker priority
    priority = ['Science/Technology','Sports','Business','World']
    best = max(priority, key=lambda c: (scores[c], -priority.index(c)))
    return best

df['category'] = df.apply(lambda r: categorize(r.get('title'), r.get('description')), axis=1)

total = int(pd.to_numeric(df['article_id']).nunique())
sci = int((df['category']=='Science/Technology').sum())
frac = sci/total if total else None

out = {
    'total_articles': total,
    'science_technology_articles': sci,
    'fraction': frac
}
print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps(out))
